mnemonics: PERCEIVE: Percept, Environment, Rules, Condition, Entity, Inference, Veto, Execute (for the components of an expert system working in a grid world like Wumpus)
keyPoints: An expert system for Wumpus World uses a knowledge base of logical rules to reason about the environment.
It infers safe squares and the location of the Wumpus/Pits from percepts (Stench, Breeze, Glitter, Bump, Scream).
The system's performance is measured by its ability to maximize the score by finding gold and avoiding danger.
commonMistakes: Confusing the percepts (e.g., assuming a Breeze means the Wumpus is adjacent, when it actually indicates a Pit).
Forgetting that the expert system's knowledge is static and must be explicitly updated with new inferences from each percept.
